message:
refactor(syscall): migrate host_resolve to native syscalls

Migrated 5 libc::syscall calls in host symbol resolution:
- raw_read, raw_open, raw_close, raw_fstat, mmap
- Added sys_fstat wrapper for file status queries

bd-h5x EPIC progress: 633->628 libc::syscall calls remaining

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
